# Documentation

> This file indexes the documentation for LLM consumption.
> Each entry links to the clean Markdown version of the page.

## Pages

- [Workflow basics - Go SDK](https://docs.temporal.io/develop/go/workflows/basics.md): This section explains Workflow basics with the Go SDK
- [Temporal Workflow Definition](https://docs.temporal.io/encyclopedia/workflow-definition.md): A Workflow Definition in Temporal is the code that defines the constraints of a Workflow Execution.
- [Temporal Workflow](https://docs.temporal.io/encyclopedia/workflows.md)
